claims.evidence_text: In the control variant, the shoot : root ratio was 0.961±0.020 g for fresh weight (S/RFw) and 0.979±0.006 g for dry weight (S/RDw).
claims.claim_summary: In wheat seedlings (BBCH 12-13), the untreated control shoot:root mass ratio was ~0.96 (fresh) and ~0.98 (dry), i.e. root and shoot biomass roughly equal.
